calendar.matters:
Motion For Order Directing Clerk To Accept The Renewal Of Judgment Nunc Pro Tunc As Timely Filed; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; Declaration Of E. Jeffrey Banchero In Support Of Motion
Off Calendar Dec-18-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF KASTNER BANCHERO LLP'S Motion For Order Directing Clerk To Accept The Renewal Of Judgment Nunc Pro Tunc As Timely Filed

Plaintiff's "motion for order directing clerk to accept the renewal of judgment nunc pro tunc as timely filed" is granted.

Order is signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/RBU)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-18-2013 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up
Off Calendar Oct-10-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Proceedings reported by: Laura Martinez, CSR#11332. Telephone #415 250 2926.

John D. Ellis, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, KASTNER BANCHERO LLP
Jeffrey banchero sworn and examined on behalf o Plaintiff.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) MAGATTE WADE-MARCHAND.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.

After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $121,502.16
Pre-Judgment Interest: $56,936.50
Attorney's Fees: $0.00
Costs: $455.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $178,893.21
Judgment signed in open court.
